description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 21 hrs 20 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 35 mins. His WakaTime activity was spread across 6 projects, and the main languages were Java, Other, Markdown, and TypeScript. There were no GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repos recorded this week.
